title: Find Minimum Time to Finish All Jobs
titleCn: 完成所有工作的最短时间

testcases.input: jobs = [3,2,3], k = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: By assigning each person one job, the maximum time is 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: By assigning each person one job, the maximum time is 3.

testcases.input: jobs = [1,2,4,7,8], k = 2 Output: 11 Explanation: Assign the jobs the following way: Worker 1: 1, 2, 8 (working time = 1 + 2 + 8 = 11) Worker 2: 4, 7 (working time = 4 + 7 = 11) The maximum working time is 11.
testcases.expectedOutput: 11 Explanation: Assign the jobs the following way: Worker 1: 1, 2, 8 (working time = 1 + 2 + 8 = 11) Worker 2: 4, 7 (working time = 4 + 7 = 11) The maximum working time is 11.
